title: KEILEOHO 4mm x 150m Natural Jute Rope, 492FT Twisted Hemp Rope for Scratching Post, Luggage Twine
features: NATURAL MATERIAL - Our 4mm jute rope is strong and durable, and the material is made of strong jute, which can better bind your goods without worrying about breakage. It is definitely the best choice in your life.

EXTRA LONG - Adequate length and medium thickness. This is a bundle of jute twine 150 meters/492 feet long and 4mm/0.16 inch thick. This length is sufficient for a variety of craft and bundling applications.

EASY TO USE - Twisted by multiple strands, the jute cord won’t tangle with each other. It is easy to tie into knots and you can use it for knitting. It can also be cut to different lengths to suit your needs, which is very convenient.

VERSATILE - This twisted hemp rope is perfect for various projects, such as gardening, temporary fencing, construction, luggage twine and so on. It combines bundling and decorating in it, beautiful and functional.
description: ☞Made of natural jute with a muted tone that preserves the natural look of the jute. It is strong and resistant to breakage. ☞You can cut any length as required to fit your purpose. It is easy to tie into knots and you can use it for knitting. ☞With a diameter of 4mm / 0.16 inch and a length of 150m/492 feet, the jute twine string has rustic look and can be used on various occasions. ☞This natural jute rope is perfect for scratching post, wall hangings, luggage twine. SPECIFICATION: Material: jute Size: 150m x 4mm/492ft x 0.16in Color: brown Quantity: 1 x Natural Jute Rope
